sections.paragraph:
Aphek H663
1. A city
- Of the tribe of Asher
Jos 19:30
- Called Aphik
Jdg 1:31
2. A city of the tribe of Issachar
- Philistines defeat Israelites at
1Sa 4:11
- Saul slain at
1Sa 29:1; 1Sa 31:13
- Probably the same mentioned in Josua 12:18 as a royal city of the Canaanites
Jos 12:18
3. A city between Damascus and Palestine. Ben-Hadad defeated at
1Ki 20:30
